name: Bronze pocket watch on a chain
description: A bronze pocket watch on a chain with an eagle on the cover, from a private antique collection.

name: Secure Folder 0022
description: A special protected folder for storing important documents. Almost impossible to break open or destroy. It has the number 0022 and a strange symbol on it.

name: Secure Folder 0031
description: A special protected folder for storing important documents. Almost impossible to break open or destroy. It has the number 0031 and a strange symbol on it.

name: Sealed letter
description: A package with correspondence found on the Scav's body in the Factory.

name: Bank case
description: An armored bank case. It clearly hides something valuable, and thus survived many attempts of breaking it open.

name: Carbon case
description: An expensive-looking armored case, which has "Property of TerraGroup Labs Inc" written on it.

name: Secure Folder 0052
description: A special protected folder for storing important documents. Almost impossible to break open or destroy. It has the number 0052 and a strange symbol on it.

name: Secure Folder 0048
description: A special protected folder for storing important documents. Almost impossible to break open or destroy. It has the number 0048 and a strange symbol on it.

name: Golden Zibbo lighter
description: A golden gasoline Zibbo lighter. Property of a certain Uruguay - a local bandit.

name: Secure Folder 0013
description: A special protected folder for storing important documents. Almost impossible to break open or destroy. It has the number 0013 and a strange symbol on it.

name: Sliderkey Secure Flash drive
description: The Sliderkey secure flash drive. Such USB sticks are frequently used by TerraGroup management. They can definitely contain sensitive data.

name: Sealed letter with a TG logo
description: A package with correspondence with a "TG" logotype. If unsealed, the value of it is instantly gone.

name: Syringe with a chemical
description: Syringe with a chemical

name: Key to the closed premises of the Health Resort
description: A key to the closed premises of the Azure Coast Health Resort.

name: UAV SAS disk #1
description: A reinforced case with an SAS hard drive. Used for data storage in military industry.

name: UAV SAS disk #2
description: A reinforced case with an SAS hard drive. Used for data storage in military industry.

name: Toughbook reinforced laptop
description: A laptop in a special protected case. Used by military and private companies in the face of the increased danger of damage to the device.

name: Sliderkey Flash drive
description: The Sliderkey secure flash drive. Such USB sticks are frequently used by TerraGroup employees. This ones seems to have been used by the Health Resort workers.

name: Working hard drive
description: A random access storage device (information storage device), based on the magnetic recording principle. Serves as the main data drive in most computers.

name: Secure Folder 0060
description: A special protected folder for storing important documents. Almost impossible to break open or destroy. It has the number 0060 and a strange symbol on it.

name: Blood sample
description: A blood sample found on the car door. It was hard getting even this much.

name: Package of graphics cards
description: A package sealed with a large amount of tape. It's quite battered, but the contents appear to be intact.

name: Goshan cargo manifests
description: Goshan cargo manifests, partially torn up, but the shipment information can still be read.

name: OLI cargo manifests
description: OLI cargo manifests, partially torn up, but the shipment information can still be read.

name: IDEA cargo manifests
description: IDEA cargo manifests, partially torn up, but the shipment information can still be read.

name: OLI cargo route documents
description: Documents describing the route of shipment of batteries for OLI store in Ultra mall.

name: Clothes design handbook - Part 1
description: A book on clothing design and manufacturing technologies with various materials. Part 1

name: Clothes design handbook - Part 2
description: A book on clothing design and manufacturing technologies with various materials. Part 2

name: Chemical container #1
description: Hermetic container for storing various chemicals.

name: Chemical container #2
description: Hermetic container for storing various chemicals.

name: Chemical container #3
description: Hermetic container for storing various chemicals.

name: Motor Controller #1
description: A configurable motor controller block used on main battle tanks and weapon systems.

name: Motor Controller #2
description: A configurable motor controller block used on main battle tanks and weapon systems.

name: Motor Controller #3
description: A configurable motor controller block used on main battle tanks and weapon systems.

name: Single-axis Fiber Optic Gyroscope #1
description: An extremely durable single-axis fiber optic gyroscope developed for military applications in harsh environments. Used for vehicle navigation and weapon systems.

name: Single-axis Fiber Optic Gyroscope #2
description: An extremely durable single-axis fiber optic gyroscope developed for military applications in harsh environments. Used for vehicle navigation and weapon systems.

name: Flash drive with fake info
description: A specially prepared flash drive containing false data about the movement of shipments.

name: Encrypted message
description: A package containing encrypted information.

name: Photo album
description: Jaeger's old leather photo album.

name: Surgery kit marked with a blue symbol
description: A well-worn surgical first aid kit for bullet wounds and other serious injuries and wounds, heavily stained with blood and marked with a strange blue symbol.

name: Marked Ophthalmoscope
description: A medical device for diagnostic eye examination, marked with a strip of tape.

name: Flash drive marked with blue tape
description: A flash drive marked with blue tape. Such flash drives are often used by TerraGroup staff.

name: T-90M Commander Control Panel
description: A tank commander control panel for controlling tank artillery. Allows the control of T-90M main cannon.

name: Military documents #1
description: A folder with military notes and paper maps. An extremely valuable thing for foreign counterparties.

name: Military documents #2
description: A folder with military notes and paper maps. An extremely valuable thing for foreign counterparties.

name: Military documents #3
description: A folder with military notes and paper maps. An extremely valuable thing for foreign counterparties.

name: Medical record #1
description: A journal with medical notes. The writing is barely readable, but it is of great value to certain third parties.

name: Medical record #2
description: A journal with medical notes. The writing is barely readable, but it is of great value to certain third parties.

name: MBT Integrated Navigation System
description: The central control block of the GALS-D3 navigational complex for T-72 and T-90 tanks.

name: Laptop with information
description: A laptop in a special protected case. Used by military and private companies in the face of increased danger of damage to the device.

name: Water pump operation data
description: A document containing data about water pumps at the water treatment plant.

name: Pumping station operation report
description: A document containing operational reports of the pumping station at the water treatment plant.

name: Stolen military documents
description: Stolen military documents

name: Sealed letter
description: A package with correspondence.

name: Radio transmitter body
description: A body of the DSP transmitter.

name: Secure Flash drive V3
description: A secure flash drive with unknown information. Write-protected and labeled "V3".

name: Working hard drive
description: A random access storage device (information storage device), based on the magnetic recording principle. Contains information on aerial movement in the Norvinsk region.

name: Accountant's notes
description: A diary with all sorts of financial data.

name: Secure Flash drive
description: A flash drive found inside the car dealership manager's office.

name: Registered letter
description: A letter from Prapor. Better not open it.

name: AG guitar pick
description: A guitar pick with the letters "AG" engraved on it.

name: Housing office journal
description: A journal with a leather cover. Covered with various names, addresses and phone numbers.

name: Chemical container with samples
description: Hermetic container for storing various chemicals.

name: Working hard drive
description: A random access storage device (information storage device), based on the magnetic recording principle. Contains CCTV footage from the Concordia residential complex.

name: Flash drive with recordings
description: A secure flash drive containing various recordings.

name: Informant's journal
description: A journal found inside the informant's hideout.

name: Forged Lightkeeper intelligence
description: A fake intelligence, forged by Lightkeeper.

name: Lightkeeper intelligence
description: An original intelligence, containing dirt on Lightkeeper.

name: Secured tape
description: A tape with encrypted data.

name: Paramedic's GPhone X
description: A smartphone with valuable data belonging to the ambulance paramedic.

name: Journal
description: A journal of someone who really loves everything Soviet.

name: Chef's diary
description: A diary containing valuable data belonging to a chef from the Beluga restaurant.

name: Secret component
description: A vial with a secret component used to make the most delicious food. May also make you agree to ridiculous deals and tell all your company secrets.

name: Bottle of Le Jean wine
description: A bottle of rare French collector soft wine Le Jean.

name: TerraGroup scientist's hard drive
description: A random access storage device (information storage device), based on the magnetic recording principle. Contains various compromising data on TerraGroup.

name: Cadastral registry records
description: Cadastral registry records containing data on TerraGroup real estate in Tarkov.

name: Battered diary
description: A small diary that had been abandoned by its owner a long time ago. The entries are barely legible due to the rough handwriting.

name: LEDX Skin Transilluminator (US Version)
description: You can argue endlessly that different factories of the same company provide comparable quality, but at the critical moment everyone chooses the original.... Perhaps TerraGroup had special arrangements with the American factory to supply a newer model of LEDX.

name: Gaming magazine
description: An issue of a gaming magazine that first wrote about one world-famous shooter game.

name: Hard drive
description: A random access storage device (information storage device), based on the magnetic recording principle. Contains stolen user data.

name: Tarkov City souvenir key
description: In the old days, the symbol of power in large cities was a luxurious key the size of a hand. In Tarkov, this tradition was revived, but the key itself was made smaller. Some say that this is the reason why it was lost: someone attached the souvenir to a bunch of keys by mistake and took it away from the town day celebration.

name: Lab journal
description: The records in this journal reveal side effects after interacting with TerraGroup's drugs... The factory workers likely were unaware of this "research".

name: Pilot logbook
description: A RUAF pilot logbook. It's unclear how it ended up in the cockpit of the foreign AS350 helicopter. Either the USECs ran out of their own logbooks, or the BEARs ran out of helicopters.

name: Chemical sample
description: There's no telling what was in the tank container. It looks nasty, and smells even worse. TerraGroup must have used these tanks to store precursors for their research.

name: Chemical container
description: Hermetic container for storing various chemicals.

name: Blood sample
description: A blood sample taken from the body of one of the workers at Chemical Plant No. 16. The bodies are clearly not recent, but the blood has not even dried up. Even the texture is the same as fresh blood.

name: Case with precision tools
description: A case containing various expensive precision tools.

name: Stolen weapon case
description: Stolen weapon case.

name: Package for Prapor
description: A package that the BTR driver was supposed to deliver to Prapor.

name: KOSA UAV electronic jamming device
description: The device is designed to suppress UAV guidance systems. Helps to reliably protect any facility from airborne attacks.

name: Cargo for Prapor
description: A delivery from outside the cordon that Prapor is waiting for. Judging by the weight, it feels like it's half-empty.

name: KOSA UAV electronic jamming device
description: The device is designed to suppress UAV guidance systems. Helps to reliably protect any facility from airborne attacks.

name: Incriminating letter
description: A letter from the BTR driver. Apparently, the information inside could put serious pressure on Skier.

name: Lightkeeper's case
description: From the sounds of it, the case is filled with something heavy like OFZ shells or other munitions.

name: Lightkeeper's case
description: From the sounds of it, the case is filled with something heavy like OFZ shells or other munitions.

name: TerraGroup shipment report
description: A stack of documents with data on TerraGroup shipments. Contains reports on completed and planned shipments.

name: Delivery crew report
description: It looks like this journal was used by the entire loading crew to mark all the loads that had already been completed. How could the foreman make any sense of this handwriting?

name: Box with upgraded tools
description: The box is sealed, but judging by the sounds inside, it contains the tools Mechanic was looking for.

name: Skier's wallet
description: It's hard to believe this wallet is anything special to Skier. It's just an old, shabby wallet. How has it not disintegrated yet?

name: Knossos senior manager's diary
description: Meetings, facilities, and other notes from Knossos senior manager are noted in the diary. If you study them, you can get at least a rough summary of the company's facilities.

name: VPX Flash Storage Module marked Group #3
description: The VPX Flash Storage Module (FSM) provides high-performance, high-capacity, solid-state SATA storage with AES-256 bit encryption using an Application Specific Integrated Circuit (ASIC). Judging by the marking, it contains data on the focus group experiments and research.

name: Slaughter videotape
description: A videotape with traces of blood and the words “Slaughter”. The owner of the tape hardly felt sympathy for his victims.

name: AK-50 barrel
description: A 24 inch barrel for the AK-50 sniper rifle.

name: AK-50 dust cover
description: A receiver dust cover for the AK-50 sniper rifle.

name: AK-50 handguard with gas block
description: An M-LOK handguard with railed gas block for the AK-50 sniper rifle.

name: Programmer's phone
description: A broken generic phone, nothing out of the ordinary. However it might help to find Mechanic's acquaintance.

name: Programmer's diary
description:
An unremarkable diary, there are hundreds of those in Tarkov. But don't judge a book by its cover: this particular one contains many dangerous secrets.

The first page has a table of contents:
• Update
• Notes 
• Highlights
• Encrypt
• Agenda 
• Ruminates
• Drafts

name: Disk with release version
description: A simple disk with a handwritten note that this is the second version, the final one. Finally you can go through the whole game all the way to the end. Gotta write a review later!

name: Ref dirt
description: A folder of photos, charts, bank records, e-mail printouts and surveillance diaries of Arena employees.
